steps.title: Translate the percent increase
steps.content: Each year, the new amount is $13\%$ greater than the previous year's amount. That means each year is multiplied by $1+0.13=1.13$.

steps.title: Classify the model
steps.content:
A repeated percent change has exponential form:
$$\text{amount}=20{,}000(1.13)^t$$
Because the base $1.13$ is greater than $1$, the amount increases over time.

steps.title: Choose the description
steps.content: The model is exponential because the same percentage is applied repeatedly. It is increasing because the multiplier is greater than $1$. Choice B — Increasing exponential.
